ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion to which the country belongs */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year in which the data was collected */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is a leap year */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year (January, February, etc.) */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the year (1-366) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_year" (
  "country_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country-year combination */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "status" TEXT /* Development status of the country (e.g., Developing, Developed) */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual GDP growth rate */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Annual inflation rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Annual unemployment rate */,
  "education_index" REAL /* Education index value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_year_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_year_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator record */,
  "country_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country-year combination */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth (years) */,
  "adult_mortality" REAL /* Adult mortality rate (per 1000 population) */,
  "infant_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of infant deaths (per 1000 live births) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" REAL /* Average alcohol consumption (liters per capita) */,
  "percentage_expenditure" REAL /* Percentage of health expenditure in GDP */,
  "hepatitis_b_coverage" INTEGER /* Hepatitis B vaccination coverage (percentage) */,
  "measles_cases" INTEGER /* Number of measles cases */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) (kg/m^2) */,
  "under_five_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths of children under five (per 1000 live births) */,
  "polio_coverage" INTEGER /* Polio vaccination coverage (percentage) */,
  "total_expenditure" REAL /* Total healthcare expenditure (per capita, USD) */,
  "diphtheria_coverage" INTEGER /* Diphtheria vaccination coverage (percentage) */,
  "hiv_aids_prevalence" REAL /* HIV/AIDS prevalence (percentage) */,
  "malaria_cases" INTEGER /* Number of malaria cases */,
  "tuberculosis_cases" INTEGER /* Number of tuberculosis cases */,
  "cancer_incidence" REAL /* Cancer incidence rate (per 100,000 population) */,
  "mental_health_prevalence" REAL /* Mental health disorder prevalence (percentage) */,
  "smoking_prevalence" REAL /* Smoking prevalence (percentage) */,
  "obesity_rate" REAL /* Obesity rate (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_country_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_year_id") REFERENCES country_year ("country_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "country_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country-year combination */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) (USD) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "thinness_1_19_years" REAL /* Prevalence of thinness among children aged 1-19 years (percentage) */,
  "thinness_5_9_years" REAL /* Prevalence of thinness among children aged 5-9 years (percentage) */,
  "income_composition_of_resources" REAL /* Income composition of resources (percentage) */,
  "schooling" REAL /* Average years of schooling */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient (measure of income inequality) */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate (percentage of population below the poverty line) */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate (percentage of the labor force that is employed) */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income */,
  "consumer_price_index" REAL /* Consumer Price Index (CPI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_year_id") REFERENCES country_year ("country_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "country_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country-year combination accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP request method (GET, POST, etc.) */,
  "response_status" INTEGER /* HTTP response status code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_country_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_year_id") REFERENCES country_year ("country_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (CSV, JSON, etc.) */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is provided */,
  "data_quality_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the data quality (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source mapping */,
  "country_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country-year combination */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (health, economic, etc.) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (annual, quarterly, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_country_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_year_id") REFERENCES country_year ("country_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "country_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country-year combination the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (CSV, JSON, etc.) */,
  "is_compressed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is compressed */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_country_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_year_id") REFERENCES country_year ("country_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "upload_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data file */,
  "data_source_version" TEXT /* Version of the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (survey, census, etc.) */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Geographic coverage of the data (national, regional, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_upload_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality log */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of any issues found */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "issue_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the data issue (low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution steps taken */,
  "responsible_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for resolving the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_responsible_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id")
)
